hotel_name: Khách sạn trung tâm Quy Nhơn (Quy Nhon center hotel)

reviews.title: Mrs
reviews.text: Room not clean,no sleeper,bath towels very very old ( white towels turned to yellow).Host was not respond

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Todo fue muy bien, limpio y cómodo, la gente muy servicial.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
I have stayed here 4-5 times before and it WAS a great value. I have recommended this hotel to others.   Apparently something has changed. I received a room that the bathroom ceiling was ripped out from the water damage. Sewage drips from the bathroom above onto the toilet (and you)! I rinsed the floor with a little bleach before showering and just used the toilet at nearby cafe.
  The same woman at reception is still sweet as ever, housekeeping is great (this is NOT their fault) but i can not recommend this place that rents rooms like this rather than closing the room until fixed. 
  I used to really like the place..... hopefully it will go back to the value it once was.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Sàn nhà nhớt, nhìn chung khá dơ.

reviews.title: Bed is hard as rock
reviews.text: The bed is so hard, that you would rather change to another hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 마트가가깝고 주위에 가성비있는식당과 카페가 많음 마트는 go마트 대형마 트는아님

reviews.title: Budget motel
reviews.text: One gets what one pays for. This is a budget motel. Though newly built, most things in the room were either broken or ill-designed. The doors have cracks which will allow for full view should anyone from the hallway be interested. My room was filled with food smell at times. Bath towels are thin and smelly. I would not stay at this hotel again.

reviews.title: Not ok
reviews.text: The room smelled like it wasn’t ventilated in a while. Pretty basic room, clean, well located, but you can find much better places at a slightly higher prices. I moved out the next day and went to another one muuuuch better

reviews.title: Tôi thấy phù hợp cho túi tiền.
breakfast is terrible and too expensive
reviews.text: the staff told me it would cost me 70.000 VND/ person/ meal for the breakfast buffet. However, the food is terrible. there are only a few types of foods, and the amount is also not sufficient. Never come back.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch, không gian yên tĩnh

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: The room was not soundproof
reviews.text: I mean I don't need a completely soundproofing room, but when I was there, a room nearby was under renovating, and it's so loud.

reviews.title: Tôi hài lòng với kỳ nghỉ này
Good for one night.
reviews.text: The location is it's main advantage. But it's not really soundproof you can hear everything that is going like if your neighbor is deciding to watch TikTok Videos at 7am in the hallway. The beds are hard for people who prefer that.

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.positives: Đặt phòng nghỉ thông qua Booking.com là tin cậy, yên tâm; cách làm khoa học, chắc chắn. Khách sạn Quy Nhơn Center 51 Hoàng Diệu có đội ngũ nhân viên lịch sự, chuyên nghiệp...

reviews.title: Suitable for a few days stay
reviews.text: Friendly staff, clean room, fully equipped for a cheap room.

reviews.title: Basic Accommodation
reviews.text:
Room is basic - suitable for local, and/or backpacker.  Room is decent size and clean.  Toiletry provided.
Only one lift - slow.

reviews.title: Good Deal Stay
reviews.text:
Average room with basic necessity.  Best for local VNmese or Backpacker as things are pretty basic.
Wet bathroom style 
Bed is very hard!  I lay on the pillows provided.  They helped somewhat. 
Walkable to bus stop going to Nhon Ly, Nhon Hai.
Way too many coffee shops around, but not foods.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tiện ích ngay TT mua sắm và biển

reviews.title: good

reviews.text: Location is very convenient

reviews.title: Сделайте пожалуйста при входе в отель ручки за которые можно держаться при подьеме и спуске !!!
reviews.positives: Улыбчивые , всё ясно и понятно , быстро заселили , за 5 минут , очень чисто , есть всё, мыльные принадлежности вода , чайник кружечки . Чистейшая постель ! Цена порадовала особенно ! Рекомендуем ! Будем здесь обязательно будем гостями именно этого отеля !!!

reviews.title: Fair enough compared to the price.
reviews.text: There was a security guard watching over the night in the basement, but he didn't know how to guard the bikes properly. My rented bike had a broken trunk lock; you could just lift the seat to access it. Since I didn't leave anything important in the trunk, I thought it would be fine, but after one night, my gas was almost empty, just below one bar, even though I had just filled it up the day before and hadn't used it at all. The money is just a few tens of thousands, not worth much, but luckily I checked because moving to the hilly areas around the city, I realized, oh no, I would have to walk nearly ten kilometers without a gas station. Other than that, the room was quite new, clean, and reasonably priced.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location is really close to anything in town. Friendly staff. Good reception. Parking underground
reviews.negatives: Hard mattress, smell of mold in the room. There were ants in the room/beds

reviews.title: Great budget hotel
reviews.text: This was a bargain and a very easy stay. Only there for one night but there are a numbers of restaurants sround

reviews.title: All good
reviews.text: I did not explore the area because I was totally busy doing my paper work in my room, except going out for meals. The WinMart is a plus point.

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: I had a great experience in this hotel. I highly recommend it

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Im thank for your helping my family here

reviews.text: Nice place,  nice people

reviews.title: This hotel is new, Good quality and service.
reviews.text: Great

reviews.title: Amazing place to stay in Quy Nhon
reviews.text:
Despite its modest rating, the experience was outstanding. The staff was incredibly friendly, the rooms were clean and spacious, and the overall service exceeded expectations.

What sets this hotel apart is the unbeatable value on Agoda. The prices are incredibly reasonable, making it a budget-friendly choice for travelers. I highly recommend booking through Agoda for exclusive deals that enhance the already delightful experience. Don't miss out on this hidden gem for an affordable and enjoyable stay!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Ok good

reviews.title: VNExpress Marathon 2019 - Accommodation
reviews.text: The hotel is about 1km from the City Square, close to food streets but quite as it's about half a block on the main street. The facility is basic but ok for the price. The staff can use some training in customer service. I stayed for 3 nights and the only friendly staff I found was the night guard.

reviews.title: The bed was very comfortable, e
reviews.text: It's in a nice area and very easy to travel around town.  Facilities are new.

reviews.title: Good value for money.
reviews.text: The city bus stop is close to Koo Mart, and there are many local coffee shops nearby. The location is good, and the air conditioning is great. The staff were friendly, and the towels were nice and dry. There are many local restaurants nearby, and after a satisfying 3-night stay, I extended for one more night. It's a 20-minute walk to the beach.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: The location is not too far from the beach. I was lucky enough to have my room upgraded to a bigger one. Shops, cafes, and restaurants are nearby. All in all, if you like to relax, Quy Nhon is a good destination. People are very friendly.

reviews.title: Good valuevhotel in the center of town
reviews.text: Well located hotel in the center of Quy Nhon, clean and excellent staff who assisted when I needed it. 5-10 minute walk to the beach and many cafes and local restaurants around

reviews.title: Nice budget hotel.
reviews.text: It was a okay place to stay at. Good budget hotel.

reviews.title: Great value, excellent stay
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at this hotel in Quy Nhon
and had a great experience. The value for
money was exceptional, with affordable
rates and excellent amenities. The location
was convenient, making it easy to explore
the city. The room was spacious and clean,
providing a comfortable stay. The staff were
friendly and helpful, ensuring that all my
needs were met. The facilities were well-
maintained, including parking and hot water
availability. Overall, I highly recommend this
hotel for anyone visiting Quy Nhon.

reviews.title: Fine for the price
reviews.text: Excellent price and in a great central location. Our room and bathroom were clean, but the bed was a bit hard and there were no windows. Some difficulty communicating with the staff but everything worked out. Construction started in the room next door around 8am and was very loud. But all okay for the price!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice room, good stuff, air con very good..

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very reasonable price, well furnished.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
The woman at reception was very nice and let me put my bags behind the counter as I got there extremely early.
House keeping does an excellent job and incredibly sweet.
I would have extended if it wasn't for the bed. The bed is HARD! I am not just saying it is too firm. I am saying it is like a concrete slab with a sheet!!!! You are better off sleeping on a park bench!!!
Overall, it was clean and good value for the money. However, you may be better off removing the mattress and sleeping on the wood!!!!

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Great place. Ok place, close to all the main things

reviews.title: Very good for the price range.
reviews.text: Well worth staying here, clean, affordable, right in the center, convenient for traveling.

reviews.title: Cheap room with a discount coupon
reviews.text: I got a discount coupon to stay there  at the price of 150k VND/night in Oct 2024. It's a lovely price.  The position is in the center of the city, not very close to the sea so it'll not be the perfect option for one who want to enjoy the sea. On the other hand, it's quite close to the shopping places, restaurants..., ideal for discovering the surrounding neighbourhood. The staff is friendly. Facilities is good enough at that price.   Just one minus thing is that the room is a bit smelly at first before we turned on the air-conditioner. And the window is very small, and merely nature light in the room.

reviews.title: A small window without an outdoor view.
reviews.text: The small windowless room is clean and fully furnished, but unfortunately, there is no view to enjoy. The TV does not have internet, but the plus point is that it is close to the center of Quy Nhon city.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: good hotel, should book online to get the cheap price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Should book online

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice and cheap hotel

reviews.title: Cheap, right in the center, everything is fine.
reviews.text: If you want to find a hotel in the central area, at an affordable price but still quite comfortable, then this is a good option. This area is not suitable for guests who want to go to the beach because it is far from the beach, but it is convenient to travel to the popular eateries in Qui Nhon, and everywhere is not too far.

reviews.title: The service matches the price.
reviews.text: I immediately got a room close to the reception, but the soundproofing of the walls isn't great, so it gets quite noisy, and the smell of cigarettes from outside wafts in as well. However, on the flip side, the room is cleaned every day, so it’s tidy. The hotel is located on a main road, making it convenient to travel to various places. If all you need is a place to sleep and store your belongings, it's not a bad choice. 😁😁

reviews.title: Good place for a short and simple stay in Quy Nhon
reviews.text: Very new hotel. The rooms were clean and relatively fresh. Excellent location as the hotel lies right in the center of Quy Nhon like its name suggests. The staff was friendly and nice. Price is very affordable.

reviews.title: Prime location, good value for money
reviews.text: The hotel is in a prime location, just a few steps away from the city center.  Markets and famous eateries are nearby.  Hotel is clean and new.  The only setback is the bathroom design as there is no separate area for toilet and shower, so after you shower, the whole bathroom gets wet.  Other than that the hotel is perfect and extremely good value for money.  Staff is nice.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Great for short stay in Quy Nhon. Close to the beach. Nice to take a walk after dinner.

reviews.title: Good room
reviews.text: A cheap hotel but of very good quality, fully equipped with basic amenities, clean, and conveniently located near the center for easy travel.

reviews.title: Quy Nhon center hotel
reviews.text:
Centrally located,tidy place, friendly and courteous staffs.
How could you ask for more?!

reviews.title: Giá tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn 3-4 sao, giá tốt. Hợp lý cho đi công tác

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The place is clean, the prices are very good, the staff is friendly, overall very satisfied... I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Overall assessment
reviews.text: The room is spacious, comfortable, and clean. There are parking areas, coffee shops, and breakfast places around the area. The staff is not very enthusiastic and did not help carry the luggage to the reception.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good to be compare to its price

reviews.title: Quite good
reviews.text: The staff are enthusiastic. The room is just temporarily acceptable, but with this price and central location, it's very good.

reviews.title: The hotel is decent, in a convenient location.
reviews.text: Clean, with all the necessary amenities. The only downside is that my room doesn't have a window to let in sunlight, so it's a bit dark. But overall, considering the price, it's very satisfactory!

reviews.title: Valuable choices when traveling to Quy Nhon
reviews.text:
++  
Comfortable, tidy hotel  
Located right in the center, within walking distance to the beach and essential dining/entertainment services  
Friendly staff  
Super budget-friendly price for such a location  

--  
The hotel has old/thin towels  

Overall, for a budget of 200k, I can't ask for more; reasonable price and central location.

reviews.title: Place to stay
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located. Although it is a 2-star hotel, it is clean and fully equipped. The female staff are friendly, but the male staff can be a bit unpleasant and stubborn, often wanting to argue with customers, which can be quite annoying.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Really enjoyed my stay. Staff is really nice and helpful. Would go again.

reviews.title: It's worth trying if you just need a place to rest.
reviews.text: The location is fine, just a few hundred meters from the beach, so taking a taxi around for meals, shopping for gifts, or going for coffee only costs a few dozen. If you're going out and don't need a super fancy hotel, this hotel is fine, clean, and also near the center. The prices are very reasonable as well.

reviews.title: Great stay in Qui Nhon
reviews.text: Great location which is close to tge beach, cafe and local restaurant. Good value for money.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: A budget hotel but very clean with an accommodating staff. Well worth the money.

reviews.title: Cách âm
reviews.text: Sự cách âm giữa các phòng cần nên cải thiện. Chúng tôi bị tỉnh giấc bởi vì người của phòng bên cạnh nói chuyện quá lớn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Cheaper than the average, clean, suitable for travel, has sufficient transportation services.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient, clean hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located, easy to walk to many interesting places. The rooms are clean and the staff is friendly, providing attentive service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Enthusiastic staff, clean hotel, suitable for the price.

reviews.title: Quy Nhon Center
reviews.text: As a solo traveler, this family run hotel is ideally situated for everything you need.

reviews.title: Good. Value place
reviews.text: Nice staff. Nice facilities. Close to the beach. I’ll stay again if I’m in town

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text: Khách sạn rất mới. Vị trí gần trung tâm. Chủ khách sạn rất thân thiện.

reviews.title: Review of Center Hotel Quy Nhon
reviews.text: The room is tidy and clean, has an elevator, and is located not too far from entertainment spots. The downside is that the soundproofing is a bit poor.

reviews.title: On a business trip
reviews.text: The hotel is definitely worth experiencing! Convenient location, affordable prices, good service, and very close to areas with delicious food! 5-star rating.

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text: The room is just enough for 2 people, clean, with good service. If you're traveling and don't prioritize the accommodation too much, this place is great. Affordable price, convenient for getting around, and there are motorcycle rentals available.

reviews.title: Great location and great price
reviews.text:
Close to everything, good price and the staff are friendly and professional.
Highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Discovery hotel
reviews.text: The management went out of their way to assist us with any of our needs. Tharn was particularly efficient and is a lovely person. She looks after everybody whether they are backpackers or family couples  with the same attention.highly recommended.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Right in the middle of the city. AC works well on very hot days. Doesn't have much of a view from inside the room but you're 5 minutes walk away from the beach and main park. 45 minutes walk at most from all major locations.

reviews.title: Underrated city
reviews.text: Surrounded by cafe and restaurant, short walk to the beach , modern and new buildings

reviews.title: Central hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is centrally located, convenient for local dining services. Friendly staff and very helpful.

reviews.title: A fun vacation trip.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the center, convenient for dining services. The access road to the hotel has restricted hours for cars, so it's important to note the arrival time or ask the staff for information.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Close to the beach and right in the center. Very convenient to travel around and have a meal or coffee. Room is spacious and have a discount price for stay long term. Definitely coming back if have a chance to Quy Nhon again.

reviews.title: The hotel is decent for the price.
reviews.text: The hotel is right in the center, and you can easily walk to the flower street during Tet, which is very nice. There are also many coffee shops and restaurants within walking distance. I only have a small suggestion regarding allowing guests to smoke in the hotel lobby. You should arrange a separate area for this, as it greatly affects the fresh atmosphere during check-in.

reviews.title: Perfect place to stay for multiple nights
reviews.text:
Great value for money. Very clean rooms, you have everything in there: a kettle, hair dryer, clean fresh towels, the bedding was clean and fresh as well. The view to the street was amazing (I stayed in the 4th floor). It’s not a loud place at all so you can sleep peacefully. WiFi is very fast which is not common in low-price hotels and hostels.
The beds are a little too hard but it’s still a great place to stay.
Very good location, nice and helpful staff.
Thank you, I had great time staying in Quy Nhon with you :)

reviews.title: Quality hotel at a reasonable price.
reviews.text: The hotel is located on Hoang Dieu Street, about 500m from Quy Nhon beach, and approximately 800m from dining options. It is very close to the bus stop for the shuttle to Phu Cat Airport, just 600m away. The location is quiet. The rooms are clean and well-equipped. The bed linens are clean. Rooms are cleaned every day. The only drawback is that the staircase to the lobby is quite high, which is inconvenient for those carrying luggage.

reviews.title: GOOD QUALITY HOTEL
reviews.text: The room is clean and comfortable, the hotel has an elevator for convenient movement.

reviews.title: Giá rẻ  và sạch sẽ
reviews.text: Định ở chơi 5 ngày thấy khá tốt nên ở thêm 7 ngày nữa nếu có dịp du lịch lần sau sẽ ghé lần nữa

reviews.title: Quá tốt
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ ,đẹp, lễ tân than thiện

reviews.title: Quy Nhon Centre Hotel
reviews.text: Hotel with friendly and enthusiastic staff. The service is also good.

reviews.title: Convinience
reviews.text: Convinient place to stay in the city center. Close to Quy Nhon beach. Hotel provides motorbike renting so traveling to popular places is easy.

reviews.title: A reasonable and comfortable hotel.
reviews.text: Every day, they clean, make the bed, and replenish bath towels, water, and soap. The front desk will assist with various requests if asked. The taxi service to the airport is also very affordable (the driver didn’t respond and had a bad attitude, though). However, considering the price, it’s excellent. I would like to come again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, spacious, fully equipped, and the reception staff is super friendly, always helping me with early check-in. The hotel prices are cheaper compared to other hotels, and it is located close to the beach as well as the city center.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: Central location. Clean. Nice room. Good value for money. Inform the staff if you come late at night.

reviews.title: Clean.
reviews.text: Location is central, room is decent, price is okay, staff is friendly, it's not check-in time yet so they allowed me to store my luggage.

reviews.title: 2-star hotel in the city center of Quy Nhon.
reviews.text: I chose this place because of its convenient location, right across from Co.op Mart. There are plenty of coffee shops around. It's a great location. So for around 500,000 VND/night, you can consider it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Central hotel, clean, enthusiastic reception staff.

reviews.title: Reasonable for the price
reviews.text: It was very cheap for a room with 2 single beds. Everything was fine. The FO was ready 24/24 to help you, and it allowed us to check in earlier when the rooms were available. Near the beach

reviews.title: Helpful, responsible and lovely staff
reviews.text: All the people who work in this hotel are amazing. I never had a problem with my stay. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. The price is very affordable and the service is superb. 5 stars

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly and enthusiastic staff, will come here again next time.

reviews.title: I am very satisfied 👍, this is the most comfortable place I've been to in all of Vietnam so far.
reviews.text: The cost-performance ratio is very high, and the location is quite central, making it convenient to go anywhere. There are plenty of places to eat and drink nearby, and the room is comfortable and clean. It was the most comfortable stay I had during my entire time in Vietnam, and the park in front gives a homey feeling. I initially stayed for three nights, but since it was so comfortable, I extended my stay by two more nights. The only downside is that it takes about 15 minutes to walk to the beach; otherwise, I have no complaints. I love it here, and the front desk staff has a great attitude. They clean very well every day.

reviews.title: Great value, decent hotel
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay here, it's in a good location,  plenty of coffee shops and restaurants near by. Helpful,  friendly staff. Great room, nice shower. Very hard but strangely comfortable bed, had a good night's sleep.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Central location, convenient access to the beach, dining... Extremely friendly and pleasant staff. Affordable prices, clean rooms.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Rooms are cheap, beautiful, clean, right in the center, convenient for snacks, main meals, going out, and strolling.

reviews.title: Rest
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the rooms are tidy, and the staff is very friendly. I will stop by again if I have the chance.

reviews.title: Nice to live in, near the center, and the price is very reasonable.
reviews.text:
The price for the 7th will be a bit higher, so consider going at the beginning of the week or on Sunday when it's cheaper. The price range is only 100-130k/night.

There is parking available, and right below there is a billiards place for those who enjoy it. The owner is pretty, and the restroom is very good. Overall, it's particularly decent.

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.text: This place is right in the center, well-equipped, clean, and very affordable. Very satisfied.

reviews.title: Comfortable and convenient
reviews.text: The room is cool and clean, the staff is enthusiastic and attentive, and the service is good.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is very clean, just as I like it, the staff is friendly, and it's located in the city center.

reviews.title: Clean and conveniently located right in the center.
reviews.text: Clean rooms right in the center near the beach, convenient transportation, reasonable prices. I have returned many times and it is always the preferred accommodation choice whenever I have the chance to return to Quy Nhon.

reviews.title: Worth staying.
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in the city center, with a flower garden and greenery in front, making it very convenient for parking or turning around. 
The hotel has an elevator and a convenient basement parking lot. The address is easy to find, and it is simple to access main roads, supermarkets, cafes, and dining options. 
The waiting area is cool and spacious. The reception staff is enthusiastic and attentive. 
The rooms are clean and fully equipped. 
The hotel room rates are reasonable, comparable to central homes, but with better quality.

reviews.title: The receptionist is overenthusiastic.
reviews.text: The support staff is very enthusiastic, and the hotel is clean and worth the money.

reviews.title: My experience in Quy Nhon Center Hotel
reviews.text:
Quy Nhơn Center Hotel Review
Overall Value: 5 Stars
Staying at Quy Nhơn Center Hotel was an absolute delight. The hotel offers exceptional value for money, making it a top choice for travelers seeking both comfort and affordability. Every aspect of my stay exceeded expectations, from the quality of service to the overall ambiance.
Location: 5 Stars
Situated in the heart of Quy Nhơn, the hotel's location is unbeatable. It is conveniently close to major attractions, local restaurants, and shopping areas. The beach is just a short walk away, providing guests with easy access to the stunning coastline and vibrant city life. Whether you’re exploring the city or relaxing by the sea, everything is within reach.
Housekeeping Service: 5 Stars
The housekeeping service at Quy Nhơn Center Hotel is outstanding. The staff is attentive, friendly, and goes above and beyond to ensure that rooms are spotless and well-maintained. Daily cleaning is thorough, and any special requests are promptly addressed. The attention to detail and commitment to guest satisfaction are truly commendable.
In-Room Amenities: 5 Stars
The rooms at Quy Nhơn Center Hotel are equipped with modern amenities that cater to every need. Comfortable beds, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked minibar are just a few of the features that make for a pleasant stay. The decor is stylish and contemporary, creating a relaxing environment. Additionally, the rooms offer breathtaking views of the city or the sea, adding to the overall experience.
In conclusion, Quy Nhơn Center Hotel is a fantastic choice for anyone visiting Quy Nhơn. With its prime location, excellent housekeeping, and well-appointed rooms, it provides an unforgettable stay. I highly recommend it and look forward to returning.

reviews.title: Very convenient and clean.
reviews.text: I went with my family who has a baby to a clean and airy room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I've been there once and returned for a second time, and I'm sure I'll choose it for a third time as well. The schedule is flexible, good.

reviews.title: Accommodation
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the housekeeping staff cleans every day, I stayed for 3 days and they even helped me change to a bigger room for more comfort, the hotel is very good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Wonderful place

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The reception staff are very enthusiastic and kind, the room is clean, fully equipped, the hotel is close to the center and the prices are very low compared to the services.👍

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nhân viên thân thiện, dễ thương. Giá rẻ, ks trung tâm thành phố

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: In a very good location.

reviews.title: It's a good place to stay, the price is reasonable and the facilities are fine.
reviews.text:
There is an elevator and a convenient parking garage. 
The room is clean. 
The staff is flexible for guests to check in early from 10 AM to 2 PM without charging a fee, as long as the room is available. I find the service here to be good. 
The staff is kind and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: my little darling
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is friendly and enthusiastic, the prices booked on the app are cheaper than booking outside, the room is suitable for a budget under 200k, has Wi-Fi, air conditioning, hot water, a refrigerator, but I booked a room with a broken refrigerator, there are towels and face towels, a TV that works, a kettle, and a hairdryer. Each time I go out, the staff will clean the room thoroughly. So the experience is great <3.

Das Hotel hat eine gute Lage. Man ist in weniger als 15 Minuten am Strand und direkt neben dem Hotel ist ein Restaurant, welches sehr gut und günstig ist. 
Das einzige was wir zum Aussetzen haben ist das Bett, welches wirklich steinhart war.
Ansonsten war alles Top.

reviews.title: 트리플룸
reviews.text:
+)중심지위치와 바로 옆건물 맛있는 한국식당 있음. 
-)이호텔은 청소를 건성으로 하는듯. 바닥,침대,화장실 어디하나 전 이용자의 머리카락이 없는곳이 없음.
처음 예약한 방에 가서 쓰레기통을 열었는데 전 이용자의 쓰레기가 그대로 들어있고 머리카락이 바닥과 침대에 늘어져있어서 방을 다시배정 받았지만 큰차이 없었고 방을 세차례나 바꿔줬지만 모두 비슷했다. 침대시트도 오염되어 있어서 많이 찝찝했다.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 창문없는방 방음안되는 침실

reviews.title: 힘든숙소에요
reviews.text:
수건과 침구에선 냄새가 나고 누런 얼룩이 많았어요. 어쩔수없이 수건을 쓰면서도 찝찝했어요.
마지막날 룸바닥에 엄청큰 바퀴벌레가 있었어요.
방음은 안되서 다른방 소음이 다들리고 바로앞에 초등학교가있어 시끄러워요.
에어컨은 엄청시원하고 직원들은 친절했어요.

reviews.title: 따뜻한물 안나옴

reviews.title: 청소
reviews.text:
체크인도 늦고 결정적으로 청소를 안한것같네요
쓰레기통에 쓰레기가 그대로있어서 저는 다른봉투에 쓰레기를 넣었구요
객실바닥괴 칭대에 여성의 긴머리카락이 엄청 나오더군요
그리고 에어컨을 가동하면 가스냄새가 심하게납니다
점검해보셔야할듯

reviews.title: 끔찍한 경험
reviews.text:
첫째 각 층 마다 재떨이가 마련되어 있다 문제는 내방에 담배 연기가 들어온다는 것이다 비흡연자에게는 끔찍한 경험이엇고
둘째 방을 바꿧는데 그 방에서 쥐를 보았다 다시 방을 바꿧는데 다음날 다시 쥐가 나온 방으로 가야 했다 사과는 받지못했다
마지막엔 체크아웃 하기 몇칠전에 공사를 했는데 방에 공사 분진이 가득 차 있더군요 먼지마시고 감기걸려 누웠어요

아쉬운 점은 스태프가 영어를 못해서 못 본 척하는 느낌. 실상은 친절하신 분들 같았다.

reviews.title: Dịch vụ khách sạn rẽ tiền
reviews.text: Nệm trong phòng rất cừn, như tấm phản. TV trong phòng không kết nối được internet và cũng không có cáp TV, lấy lý do mưa bão nên đường truyền chưa sửa được. Nhân viên thái độ lòi lõm, không nhiệt tình. Thiết bị phòng tắm cũ kỹ rĩ sét. Phòng hôi hám mùi ẩm mốc. Không bao giờ đặt chân lại, và cũng khuyến nghị mn đừng dùng dịch vụ khách sạn tại đây
reviews.room_type: TWIN TWIN ROOM WITH SMALL WINDOW & 2 SINGLE BEDS

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng có mùi hôi khó chịu. Ga giường có vết máu loang lổ.

reviews.title: Thật sự thất vọng
reviews.text: Tủ lạnh bị hư, không có máy sấy, lúc xuống tính tiền còn cố gắng tính thêm tiền của mình 1 chai nước trong tủ lạnh trong khi mình không uống vì có mang nước ở nhà đi, một chai thì không đáng bao nhiêu nhưng chắc chắn sẽ không đến lần thứ hai

reviews.title: Dịch vụ quá kém
reviews.text:
Mình đi công tác ở Quy Nhơn Thường xuyên ở cũng nhiều nơi. 
    Thế nhưng không nơi nào như khách sạn này. 
      Nhân viện thì quá tệ, khinh thường khách hàng, nói chuyện cứ vênh cái mặt lên. 
      Khách sạn thì không có chỗ đậu xe oto. Có xe tự đi tìm chỗ đỗ
     Vô nhận phòng không hề thông báo vế việc ghi hoá đơn hay hỏi han gì. 
    Nói chung là là quá bức xúc
reviews.response: chào bạn, mình bên quản lý ks. Trước tiên mình rất tiếc vì trải nghiệm ko tốt của bạn. Tuy nhiên, mình đảm bảo ko có nhân viên nào ở ks có thái độ khinh thường khách từ khi mình mở ks đến giờ. Về chỗ đậu xe, mình càng chắc chắn cho bạn là đậu cả xe 45 chỗ chứ ko biết bạn đi xe gì. về hóa đơn, bạn có hiểu vấn đề mua hàng ở đâu thì bạn lấy hóa đơn ở đó ko bạn, ks chỉ có trách nhiệm hỗ trợ khi cần thiết. khách sạn bên mình từ lúc mở đến giờ làm ăn đàng hoàng bạn nhé, bạn vui lòng xem lại. mọi thắc mắc có thể liên hệ cho mình: 0914115234 (Bảo)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng xuống cấp, như nhà nghỉ thì đúng hơn

reviews.title: Tham
reviews.text: Không ở vẫn lấy tiền

reviews.title: Nhân viên quá tệ
reviews.text: Tôi đặt phòng ở đây vào ngày 15 đến 17/8 trả phòng khi đến ngày trả phòng, chúng tôi đã báo là sẽ trễ vài tiếng nhưng đến 1h thì lễ tân có gọi nhưng tôi để chuông im lặng nên không biết vì đi chơi về khá mệt, nhưng đỉnh điểm là khi chúng tôi đang nghỉ ngơi thì lễ tân lại bấm chuông phòng tôi thì nó không hoạt động nên không nghe thấy thì đùng một phát lễ tân mở cửa ra mà không hề gõ cửa hay báo là lễ tân để check. Lúc đó tôi khá bực vì thái độ của người lễ tân đó và còn bảo có người thuê rồi nên không thể ở nữa và muốn chúng tôi chuyển phòng khác. Chúng tôi không chịu và báo thu phí 100k thì chúng tôi mới không hiểu vì sao trễ 1 tiếng mà thu 100k bằng một nữa giá phòng chúng tôi thuê và không có một lời xin lỗi nào. Sau đó chúng tôi quyết định trả phòng và sẽ không bao giờ quay lại hay giới thiệu cho người gia đình. Và lễ tân là một ông chú tôi không hiểu sao đưa một người đáng tuổi cha vào làm lễ tân

reviews.title: Khách sạn có vị trí tốt nhưng tiện ích chưa đạt, phòng cần thơm hơn
reviews.text: Khách sạn có vị trí tốt nhưng tiện ích cũng như vệ sinh hơi kém. Phòng khá ám mùi thuốc lá. Mình ở đây 2 ngày, qua ngày thứ 2 tuy đã dọn phòng nhưng phòng vẫn còn mùi, không thấy khách sạn xịt thơm phòng. Tủ lạnh thì hư, ngoài 2 chai nước miễn phí thì không có trà hay cà phê gói. Nước nóng hơi chậm. Khách sạn được cái ngay trung tâm, ra quảng trường hay trung tâm thương mại gần, cách biển tầm 800m.

reviews.title: Không được tốt như review về thái độ của lễ tân
reviews.text:
- Mình book dùm gia đình, có bao gồm ăn sáng. Theo như người thân tường thuật, tới nơi lễ tân tiếp đón không được tốt, không nắm rõ thông tin phòng, booking có bao gồm ăn sáng mà lại nói không biết, phòng thì lúc check-in rất bừa bộn, phải đổi sang phòng khác. Đi toàn là phụ nữ, bảo vệ cũng không giúp một tay. 
- Còn lại đa phần cũng tốt, vị trí thuận tiện, tương đối mới và sạch sẽ. 
- Khách sạn chú ý cải thiện dịch vụ, một phần cũng do review ks tốt ~8.0 điểm nên mới đặt dùm ng nhà, nhưng bị mang tiếng luôn.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Ks nằm vị trí trung tâm, thuận lợi di chuyển đến các nơi ăn uống, điểm trừ duy nhất nệm bị cứng, nằm bị đau lưng.

reviews.title: Location tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn ngay trung tâm TP, rất thuận tiện, giá cả phải chăng. Một điểm trừ là phòng tắm bé, Ks ko có ăn sáng, tivi không bật được. Nhân viên bảo vệ khá nhiệt tình, có hỗ trợ đổi phòng nhưng tivi vẫn ko hoạt động nên thôi. Với mức giá đó thì tạm chấp nhận.

reviews.title: đã book nh ks nói k tìm được mã đặt p và nói đã hết p loại đấy và m phải thêm tiền để ở p khác

p khá bí k có view, k co cua so, ks khá đẹp nh địa điểm k đẹp, bồn rửa mặt bị hỏng k xả dc nước

reviews.title: GÓP Ý VỀ THÁI ĐỘ NHÂN VIÊN
reviews.text:
Tôi đã ở khách sạn này rất nhiều lần và trước đây luôn đánh giá cao chất lượng dịch vụ cũng như phòng ốc. Mọi thứ từ cơ sở vật chất đến tiện nghi đều ở mức chấp nhận được so với giá tiền.
Nhưng trải nghiệm lần này thực sự tệ đến mức khó chấp nhận.
Khách sạn dường như vừa tuyển một nhân viên mới – người mà tôi chưa từng gặp trước đây – và đây chính là vấn đề lớn nhất. Nhân viên này có thái độ cực kỳ thiếu tôn trọng khách hàng: NÓI CHUYỆN TO TIẾNG, GIỌNG ĐIỆU HÁCH DỊCH, CƯ XỬ KIỂU BAN PHÁT DỊCH VỤ THAY VÌ PHỤC VỤ. KHÔNG NHỮNG VẬY, CÒN CÓ BIỂU HIỆN CỐ TÌNH GÂY KHÓ DỄ TRONG QUÁ TRÌNH LÀM VIỆC.
Tôi là người trả tiền cho dịch vụ, nhưng cảm giác nhận lại giống như đang đi “xin ở nhờ”. Đây là điều hoàn toàn không thể chấp nhận đối với bất kỳ khách hàng nào.
Một khách sạn có thể không hoàn hảo về cơ sở vật chất, nhưng thái độ phục vụ là thứ tối thiểu phải có. Nếu không kiểm soát được chất lượng nhân sự, thì mọi điểm cộng trước đây đều trở nên vô nghĩa.
Tôi yêu cầu khách sạn nghiêm túc xem xét và xử lý vấn đề này. Nếu không có sự thay đổi rõ ràng, đây chắc chắn sẽ là lần cuối tôi lựa chọn khách sạn mỗi khi đến Quy Nhơn.
